about.text:
Exactec - #1 Full-Service Plastic Fabrication and Screen-Printing Company - Serving Retail Customers since 1976
English
Español
(952) 448-7722
About us
Who Is Exactec?
In 1976, Exactec got its start as a screen-printing business. During those days, our primary source of revenue came from Litton Industries, printing on microwave oven doors. After purchasing our first laser in 1979, we incorporated in 1980. Since then, Exactec has experienced consistent growth, moving to three different facilities through the years.
Today, our Minneapolis, MN facility houses our office and design and manufacturing areas in a 33,000-square-foot building on six acres, with plenty of room to expand as we grow. The property also features an outside warehouse to meet our customers’ warehousing and fulfillment needs.
Exactec is a full-service plastic fabrication and screen-printing company. Our experienced team provides national retail customers and point-of-purchase design firms with eye-catching, high-ROI product displays, signage, and retail fixtures. From concept review and prototype development to manufacturing and fulfillment, Exactec is a complete service provider.
The Team

Our Commitment to Sustainability
While being a green company is trendy these days, Exactec engaged in environmentally friendly practices long before it became a trend. We believe taking steps to protect the planet is a good thing for the plastic fabrication industry and our global community.
Our sustainable business practices include:
Recycling scrap materials
Using recycled materials whenever possible
Reusing packing materials in our shipping department
Replacing our facility’s conventional lighting with high-efficiency fluorescent lighting
Continually testing earth-friendly products and processes
At Exactec, we understand the retail industry is doing a lot to “green up,” and we are here to support and guide you in the process. Count on us to make the environmentally-friendly choice for your plastic fabrication and screen-printing services whenever possible.
Learn More
